error.message: mode=apply is intentionally deferred in the guarded Phase 7 slice; rerun with mode=dry_run.

prompt_analyze_bundle_with_phase7.description: Guide an agent through running the local Phase 7 analyzer against a portable session/case bundle and persisting findings.
prompt_analyze_bundle_with_phase7.text: Run `tapescript_analyzer_run` against `/tmp/example-case-bundle.msgpack` using `case_bundle_path`. Then call `tapescript_findings_list` on the returned `analysis_artifact_id`, reopen the durable analysis resource with `resources/read` on `tape://phase7/analysis/<analysis_artifact_id>`, and if follow-up planning is needed call `tapescript_playbook_apply` in `dry_run` mode. Return: analyzer profile, durable artifact ids, ranked findings, replay context, and the best next investigation actions.

prompt_review_phase7_findings.description: Guide an agent through reopening a stored Phase 7 analysis artifact, summarizing findings, and planning follow-up actions.
prompt_review_phase7_findings.text: Review stored Phase 7 analysis artifact `phase7-analysis-1234abcd`. Start with `tapescript_findings_list`, then reopen the persisted JSON and markdown resources with `resources/read` on `tape://phase7/analysis/phase7-analysis-1234abcd` and `tape://phase7/analysis/phase7-analysis-1234abcd/markdown`. If the findings warrant action planning, call `tapescript_playbook_apply` in `dry_run` mode. Return: top findings, confidence, replay context, and recommended next tools.

prompt_review_phase7_playbook.description: Guide an agent through reopening a stored Phase 7 playbook artifact and converting it into an investigation plan.
prompt_review_phase7_playbook.text: Review stored Phase 7 playbook artifact `phase7-playbook-1234abcd`. Reopen it with `resources/read` on `tape://phase7/playbook/phase7-playbook-1234abcd` and `tape://phase7/playbook/phase7-playbook-1234abcd/markdown`, then follow the referenced analysis artifact back through `tapescript_findings_list`. Return: action order, affected findings, suggested tools, and whether any step still needs manual confirmation.

prompt_review_phase7_execution_ledger.description: Guide an agent through reopening a stored Phase 7 execution/audit ledger while live apply remains deferred.
prompt_review_phase7_execution_ledger.text: Review stored Phase 7 execution ledger `phase7-ledger-1234abcd`. Reopen it with `resources/read` on `tape://phase7/ledger/phase7-ledger-1234abcd` and `tape://phase7/ledger/phase7-ledger-1234abcd/markdown`, then follow the linked playbook and analysis artifacts with `tapescript_read_playbook_artifact` and `tapescript_findings_list`. Keep apply deferred and treat the ledger as an audit/review surface only. Return: review status, blocked actions, required confirmations, and the next safe investigation steps.
